name: Crib Bedding Set - Unicorns - 4pc - Cloud Island™
description:
This 4-Piece Crib Bedding Set from Cloud Island™ is suitable for standard cribs and toddler beds. This bedding set includes two peach crib sheets, with unicorn prints on one and white crescent moon and star prints on the other. Also included are a channel-stitched quilt in peach adorned with decorative-stitched designs of stars and a crescent moon and a crisp white crib bedskirt with a 14-inch drop length. All pieces are made of 100% cotton and are machine washable for easy cleaning.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
